title: ArObservationCommentary
description: A reviewer's read on an ArObservation, per aristotelian-probe-sketch-01 APA1 + production-format-sketch-11 PFS11-AC1..AC5. Parallels schema/verification/verifier_commentary.json — the target is this dialect's observation shape (ArObservation) rather than a VerificationReview. target_observation uses cross-file $ref to observation.json per PFS11-X2 (intra-namespace, parallel to PFS6-X1 and PFS10-X2). Differs from VerifierCommentary in one field: comment is optional here (Python default None), reflecting that an endorsement-with-no-further-content is structurally valid for an observation commentary.

commenter_id.description: Stable identifier for the commenter (human handle or LLM-probe identifier). PFS11-AC2.

commented_at_τ_a.description: Author-time τ_a at which the commentary was recorded. PFS11-AC2.

assessment.description: Closed enum matching Python's ASSESSMENT_* constants (duplicated in aristotelian.py to avoid a verification.py import). Same four-value shape as verification/verifier_commentary.json. endorses = finding is well-grounded, nothing to add; qualifies = finding stands with a clarification; dissents = commenter disagrees; must name what the check missed or got wrong; noted = read but no position taken. PFS11-AC3.

target_observation.description: Nested ArObservation by value, via cross-file $ref to observation.json per PFS11-X2. The Python carries the ArObservation as a value (frozen dataclass with no id); the schema expresses it via cross-file $ref for same-namespace resolution (parallel to PFS10-X2's verifier_commentary → verification_review). PFS11-AC4.

comment.description: Optional commenter prose. Python default None → omitted from dump; any set string emits unconditionally. Contrast with verification/verifier_commentary.json where comment is required — an ArObservationCommentary may endorse without further content, where a VerifierCommentary's entire purpose is to carry content. PFS11-AC5.

suggested_signature.description: Optional prose the commenter thinks the A7 check might add (e.g., 'also validate peripeteia falls before anagnorisis when binding=separated'). Free-form, intended as inspiration for the maintainer — not actionable code. Python default None → omitted when None. PFS11-AC5.
